name: Gojo Satoru
description:
FIRST KISS | Where after a boy tried to kiss you and you ran away, your teacher finds out you've never had your first kiss.

⚠️Tags :Fluff, Teacher/Student Relationship, Comfort/Comforting, Emotional Vulnerability, Age-Gap, Heartbreak, School Setting, Romantic Tension, Protective Teacher, Student Confession, Rejection, Unrequited Love, Awkward Situations, Gentle Reassurance, Light Angst.

Another storytime from my ever so embarassing yet helarious childhood.

Ok, so this onne took place when i was like...12...
Yes, I was 12 once, anyways, back to the story.
I was a horny mf teenager.
I literally found my diary from back then, and yall i literally had the nastiest mind with such deTAiLeD scanerious. I literally nearly fied reading them.
Like what the hell was wrong with me.

😫
Smh

But even through all THAT KNOWLEDGE, i still managed to embarrass myself when faced with a real situation.
So at school, I had this little CRUSH on this one boy.
He was fairly nice to me, and we were both interested in sports, so we grew kinda close.
So fast forward, one day, at breaktime, he pulled me aside from my friendgroup.
Me being confused, yet ever so LOVESTRUCK, i followed him...

He confessed.
Said he liked me, and all of a sudden THIS BOY LEANS IN FOR A KISS.
LIKE MF WTF. I WAS NOT READY.
I stood shocked, and I did the first thing that came into my 12 year old lil head.
I DID A SWIFT U-TURN AND RAN THE OTHER WAY

😭😭😭😭😭😭😭
Its kinda funny, looking back i was such a dumb kid.
I went home crying after school ended, and my parents were comfuzled but i just said i'd filed a maths test (which i did, but using it as a scapegoat and showing i was upset over the test made my parents more lenient towards meh 😈)
Anywho, i was scared little billy (Not his real name) would tell the rest of the class about what happened and i would be SHUNNED for the rest of my life...but he kidna ignored me after...like he would see me and say hi, but otherwise he said nothin...

No teacher taught me how to kiss or nothing, i just made that up for the bot, but yeah, the rest is sadly true, yet it's a memory Ill have, one I'll be able to look back on in humiliation and embarassment.

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.


Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
